category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tfsort as a CLI utility to sort Terraform variables and outputs.
source_facts.description says it is a CLI to sort Terraform variables and outputs.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses AlexNabokikh/tfsort.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/AlexNabokikh/tfsort, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names Terraform variables and outputs sorting.
source_facts.executables lists tfsort as a command-line executable.
